system.description: Improves one Active Skill by +1 die per level (max +6); .5 Power Points per level for combat skills. SR2E p.125.
system.notes: SR2E p.125. Extra dice for a specific skill. Cost/die: Athletic/Stealth .25, Armed/Unarmed/Throwing/Projectile .5, Firearms/Gunnery 1. Combat skills: max extra dice ≤ current skill rating.
